title: One Slot
description: Don't use inventory, use only your hands!
body:
# One Slot Remove the inventory and hotbar to use only one hand.
WIP: In the set game mode, the inventory slots are visible but not selectable, which we will fix in the future so that only one slot is visible. ## Mod Requirements [Minecraft](https://minecraft.net/) 1.20.1
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) ## ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91ab826356a27a999c1f4b945c7861409bed6063_0.webp) ## Q&A - **Can I use this in a modpack or video?** - Ofcourse, if you're showing off the mod itself, such as a showcase or speedrun, I'd appriciate a link in the description! ##
